query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS doctrine_verified (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  doctrine_id VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  verified_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  INDEX dv_doctrine_id_idx (doctrine_id),
  INDEX dv_verified_at_idx (verified_at)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4HByWUH885AfJUE.9472483f21d7 --database kjXA9MRaPtPLGHog5yynHZ --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS doctrine_verified (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  doctrine_id VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  verified_at BIGINT NOT NULL,

  INDEX dv_doctrine_id_idx (doctrine_id),
  INDEX dv_verified_at_idx (verified_at)
